info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Subscriber Management API
info.description: The Subscriber Management API facilitates the onboarding of new subscribers to the service, ensuring a streamlined user registration process. This API allows businesses to manage subscriber details, including personal information and preferences, to enhance personalized experiences. Typical consumers include application developers and customer service platforms seeking to integrate subscriber data efficiently. Use cases vary from user registrations to promotional campaigns targeting specific subscriber segments.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to add a new subscriber to the customer database. Ensure that you provide all required information to create a subscriber successfully.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new subscriber in the customer database. It should contain all required fields to successfully add the subscriber, including personal details and preferences.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

200.description: The request was successful and the response contains the requested data.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.title: Error Response for Subscriber Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A more detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the client on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.description: This schema represents the error response structure for subscriber operations when a 500 internal server error occurs.

example.message: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving subscriber details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-ErrorD.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer involved in the error.

errorCode.description: A specific code that identifies the type of error.

message.description: A message clarifying the error context.
message.example: The subscriber with the given ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-ErrorD.description: Provides detailed information about the specific error that occurred during the operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.title: SubscriberResponse

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer related to the subscriber.

msisdn.description: Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Number (MSISDN) of the subscriber.

plan.description: The subscription plan associated with the subscriber.

network.description: The network provider for the subscriber.

status.description: Current status of the subscriber account.

message.description: Additional message pertaining to the subscriber operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.description: Represents the response for a subscriber operation.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

msisdn.description: The mobile number of the subscriber.

firstName.description: The first name of the subscriber.

lastName.description: The last name of the subscriber.

plan.description: The subscription plan of the subscriber.

network.description: The network provider for the subscriber.

activationDate.description: The date when the subscriber was activated.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.description: Represents the request body for creating a new subscriber.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.title: Error Response for Subscriber Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer information and retry the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createSubscriber-Create.description: This schema represents the structure of the error response returned when a subscriber operation encounters an error.

example.message: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer information and retry the request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
